positive: A stylized cosmic forest scene, featuring bioluminescent flora and fauna, central composition, highly detailed silhouette art. Focus on vibrant teal, deep violet, and glowing electric blue color palette against a dark midnight background. The main subject is a massive, stylized Moonflower glowing at the center, surrounded by delicate, otherworldly leaves and glowing spores. Style: Neo-Art Nouveau combined with cosmic vaporwave aesthetics. Lighting: Dramatic, ethereal glow emanating from the flora. Composition: Highly symmetrical and contained, perfect for a repeating garment print. Minimalist yet complex.
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, signature, copyright, grainy, noise, poorly drawn hands, extra limbs, bad anatomy, low resolution, simple, mundane
